label: 建筑外壳
description: 大编排器：footprint + 层数 + 每层房间布局 → 多层楼板 + 内/外墙 + 楼梯井 + 屋顶，全部包成 part 并用 fixed joint 挂在单根下。布局双模式：显式 rooms（[[x,y,w,d],...]）直通，或程序化（footprint + rooms_per_floor + seed，递归二分）。当 prompt 提到 建筑 / 楼房 / 多层 / building / house 时使用。⚠️ 只产出建筑外壳/结构（楼板+墙+楼梯井+屋顶），墙体不自动开门窗洞——门窗需另用 g_wall 的 openings 或 g_door/g_window 单独放置。
description-en: Orchestrator: footprint + floors + per-floor room layout → multi-storey slabs + interior/exterior walls + stair well + roof, all wrapped in parts under a single root via fixed joints. Dual-mode layout: explicit rooms JSON pass-through, or procedural (footprint + rooms_per_floor + seed, recursive split). Use for building/house/multi-storey. NOTE: produces only the building shell/structure (slabs + walls + stair well + roof); walls are NOT automatically cut with door/window openings — add openings via g_wall's `openings`, or place g_door/g_window separately.

inputs.name: rooms_per_floor
inputs.label: 每层房间数
inputs.description: 程序化模式目标房间数
inputs.description-en: Procedural target room count per floor.

inputs.name: rooms
inputs.label: 显式房间
inputs.description: 显式布局 JSON，每项 [x,y,w,d]（房间中心 + 边长，相对 footprint 中点）；给定则跳过程序化分割
inputs.description-en: Explicit layout JSON, each [x,y,w,d] (room center + size); when set, skips procedural split.

inputs.name: seed
inputs.label: 随机种子
inputs.description: 程序化分割种子（可复现）

inputs.name: min_room
inputs.label: 最小房间
inputs.description: 程序化分割最小房间边长（米）

inputs.name: stairwell
inputs.label: 楼梯井
inputs.description: 多层时生成楼梯 + 上层楼板开井
inputs.description-en: Emit stairs + a slab well on upper floors when multi-storey.

inputs.name: roof_type
inputs.label: 屋顶类型
inputs.description: flat / shed / gable / hip / gambrel / mansard / pyramid / none
inputs.description-en: flat / shed / gable / hip / gambrel / mansard / pyramid / none.

inputs.name: id
inputs.label: id
inputs.description: 子树前缀；空 = 自动 bldg{n}

outputs.name: geometry
outputs.label: 几何
outputs.description: 追加整栋建筑子树后的 Geometry
outputs.description-en: Geometry after appending the whole building subtree.

outputs.name: root_id
outputs.label: 根 part
outputs.description: 建筑子树根 part 的 id
outputs.description-en: Id of the building subtree root part.
